nodes.name: 判断所有必填项是否已填

parameters.query: SELECT country_code,COUNT (*) FROM public.activation_records WHERE to_timestamp(activatetime::bigint) >= '{{ $json.ActiveDate_Start }}'::timestamp AND to_timestamp(activatetime::bigint) <=  '{{ $json.ActiveDate_End}}'::timestamp + interval '1 day' - interval '1 second' AND country_code = '{{$json.Country}}' GROUP BY country_code;

nodes.name: 查询该时间段的激活设备条数

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT (*) FROM public.defective_records dr JOIN public.activation_records ar ON dr.active_id = ar.id WHERE to_timestamp(ar.activatetime::bigint) >= '{{ $json.ActiveDate_Start}}'::timestamp AND to_timestamp(ar.activatetime::bigint) <= '{{ $json.ActiveDate_End}}'::timestamp + interval '1 day' - interval '1 second' AND ar.country_code = '{{$json.Country}}' And dr.defective_date >= '{{ $json.timeIntervals[0][0] }}' and dr.defective_date <= '{{ $json.timeIntervals[0][1] }}';

nodes.name: 查询各地区各时段的不良设备数量
